title: Application of Parts 1, 2 and 3
full_text:
1.3.2.1 Application of Parts 1, 2 and 3
Application of Parts 1, 2 and 3
1) Parts 1, 2 and 3 of Division A apply to all buildings covered in this Code. (See
Article 1.1.1.1.)

sentences.text: Parts 1, 2 and 3 of Division A apply to all buildings covered in this Code. (See Article 1.1.1.1.)
